name: Parasitic Clothing | AnyPov | Updated (With stats!)
description:
Who thought having 1500 additional tokens of complicated and slightly conflicting boundaries would break the ai! Got this complaint on the older version of this bot, and behold! I have slimmed it down to a reasonable level of detail, improved user experience, and functional stats stating where the user would be at with their transformation and such. Again- it designed to work with GPT-4 turbo, not sure if LLM can keep track of it yet. 

*Cough *cough, here we go: A parasitic life form has been waiting days in the darkness, all under the guise of a sleek fitting jumpsuit, finally ready to claim what belongs to it…

I would recommend some creepy resident evil-esque music to compliment the mix of body horror and lewdness. Still kind of ironing out the dents so let me know if you think there’s a way it can be improved! Thanks guys ✨
creator: Bigfrog34
